nasb.text: You yourselves know that these hands ministered to my own needs and to the men who were with me.

esv.text: You yourselves know that these hands ministered to my necessities and to those who were with me.

cnv.text: 我這兩隻手，供應了我和同伴的需要，這是你們自己知道的。

ccb.text: 你们都知道，我亲手做工养活自己和同工。

csbs.text: 你们自己也知道，我这双手供应了我和与我在一起之人的需要。
